description: TrueNAS SCALE 25.x — Full system dashboard. Requires graphite-exporter with the accompanying graphite_mapping.conf. Covers CPU, memory, network (dynamic interface selector), storage, ZFS pool & ARC, NFS, services, and cgroup containers. Compatible with TrueNAS SCALE 25.04 and 25.10.x (Goldeye).
